summary: Completed frontend testing of TraderDashboard modularization and admin panel improvements. All trader pages work correctly after refactoring.
critical_code_review_comments: TraderDashboard.js successfully reduced from 3283 to 2186 lines through modularization
Modular components properly organized in /components/trader/ directory
UnifiedMessagesHub displays improved placeholder with quick action buttons
Landing page hero section displays correctly for non-authenticated users
